verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm gonna hold on, hold on to Jesus, Hold to the Lamb of Calvary I'm gonna hold on, hold on to Jesus And Jesus will hold on to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Ol' Satan keeps on talkin' saying' you can't make it Tryin' to convince me there's no use to try But I refuse to listen and keep right on goin' Trustin' and believing' in the name of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In this troubled world we live in nothin' seems to make sense Many looking' for the way, searching to and fro Sometimes this rope I'm holdin' seems to be slippin' but I'm gonna hold on tighter to the only hope I know
